# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: ""
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: registry.internal.example.com/frontend-service:v1.4.2@sha256:a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
              name: http-web
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: frontend-db-credentials
                  key: password
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http-web
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http-web
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          proxyMetadata:
            ISTIO_META_DNS_CAPTURE: "true"
            ISTIO_META_DNS_AUTO_ALLOCATE: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "500m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: registry.internal.example.com/backend-api-service:v2.1.0@sha256:b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8443
              protocol: TCP
              name: https-api
            - containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
              name: http-metrics
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 512Mi
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "8443"
            - name: METRICS_PORT
              value: "9090"
            - name: API_SECRET_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: backend-api-secrets
                  key: api-secret-key
            - name: DB_CONNECTION_STRING
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: backend-db-credentials
                  key: connection-string
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            - name: ENABLE_TLS
              value: "true"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: https-api
              scheme: HTTPS
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: https-api
              scheme: HTTPS
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: tls-certs
              mountPath: /etc/tls
              readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
        - name: tls-certs
          secret:
            secretName: backend-api-tls
            defaultMode: 0400
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-processing-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-processing-service
    version: v1
    mesh: istio
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-processing-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-processing-service
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          terminationDrainDuration: 30s
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "192Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "750m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "384Mi"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-processing-service-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: order-processor
          image: registry.internal.example.com/order-processing-service:v1.8.3@sha256:c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
              name: http-svc
            - containerPort: 9090
              protocol: TCP
              name: http-metrics
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            privileged: false
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 1Gi
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: KAFKA_BROKER_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: order-kafka-credentials
                  key: password
            - name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: order-encryption-secrets
                  key: encryption-key
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http-svc
            initialDelaySeconds: 25
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http-svc
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 200Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-service-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-processing-service-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-processing-service
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: production-strict-mtls
  namespace: production
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/production/sa/frontend-service-sa
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "8443"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-to-order-processing-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-processing-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - cluster.local/ns/production/sa/backend-api-service-sa
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "8080"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: production
spec:
  {}
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: frontend-sidecar-scope
  namespace: production
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: frontend-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./backend-api-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
        - "istio-system/*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: backend-api-sidecar-scope
  namespace: production
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: backend-api-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "./order-processing-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
        - "istio-system/*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: order-processing-sidecar-scope
  namespace: production
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: order-processing-service
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "istio-system/*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: production-default-deny
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-istio-sidecar
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      mesh: istio
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
    - to:
        - podSelector: {}
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: frontend-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: backend-api-service
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8443
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: kube-system
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
